description_long: This fork features a sleek, metallic appearance with a golden hue, suggesting it is made from brass or a similar alloy. It has five evenly spaced, straight tines that are slightly tapered at the tips, providing a functional and elegant look. The handle is gently curved and tapers smoothly from the base to the end, with no visible decorative engravings or embellishments. The surface of the fork is smooth and reflective, giving it a polished, high-quality finish. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for both casual and formal dining settings. The fork is displayed on a flat, wooden surface with a rich brown color and visible wood grain.
description: A golden metallic fork with five straight tines and a smooth, gently curved handle, shown on a wooden surface. The fork has a polished, reflective finish and a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: The fork is seen from the front, highlighting the five straight tines and the symmetrical alignment of the prongs.
description_view_1: The fork is viewed from the side, showcasing the gentle curve and taper of the handle, as well as the thin profile of the tines.
description_view_2: The fork is seen from the back, again emphasizing the straight alignment of the tines and the smooth, unadorned handle.
description_view_3: The fork is viewed from the opposite side, displaying the same gentle handle curve and the thinness of the fork's body.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is gently curved, tapers smoothly from the base to the end, and has a flat, unadorned surface with no visible decorative features.
attribute_tine_alignment: The tines are straight, parallel, and evenly spaced with no visible irregularities.
